channel.title: Budget Build Bench
channel.description: Fresh takes for PC builders on a budget.

item.title: The state of GPUs in 2026
item.description: A field report on gpus: where things stand, and what PC builders on a budget should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Used Parts without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to used parts for PC builders on a budget — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "best budget gpu 2026" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "best budget gpu 2026" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why PC builders on a budget are rethinking Upgrades
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how PC builders on a budget approach upgrades — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Benchmarks on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in benchmarks — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Used Parts: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping used parts for PC builders on a budget.
